category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a non-web browser for multiple protocols; official homepage describes building and running Bombadillo.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is Bombadillo: Home; source_facts.name is bombadillo.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Bombadillo site; homepage references source, installs, and precompiled executables.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official coker.com.au page provides release archives but no official source-control project URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it benchmarks file systems and hard drives; official coker.com.au page describes hard drive and file system performance tests.
